reviewReply.comment:
Hi Jasleen,
We’re genuinely disheartened to know that your experience didn’t meet expectations. This is far from what we aim to deliver at Coffee Island. We’d love to better understand what went wrong and find a way to make things right.

Could you please share your contact details with us at hello@coffeeisland.in or DM us at @coffee.island.india so someone from our team can personally reach out? 

Your feedback is valuable, and we’d appreciate the chance to turn this around
